title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 514.130 - In cases of certiorari, successful party to recover costs
text:
514.130.  In cases of certiorari, successful party to recover costs. — In all cases where either party shall sue out a certiorari upon any judgment where the same shall be allowed by law, the successful party in the superior court shall recover costs in both courts.
(RSMo 1939 § 1413) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1237; 1919 § 1689; 1909 § 2258
